content.en:
Another period of time has passed.

"The thirty-seventh tempering is complete!"

Ye Tian smiled.

This proved that he could surpass thirty-six refinements, while those half-step fivefold ancestors who had comprehended one hundred and eight extreme extremes could only refine thirty-six times at most.

From the foundation, he once again surpassed those half-step fivefold ancestors, and he surpassed them again and again, and it was terrifying when superimposed in the later stage!

The thirty-eighth tempering!

The thirty-ninth tempering!

Fortieth Tempering!

......

With the passage of time, Ye Tian completed the tempering again and again, although the time spent in the later stage became longer and longer, but with the assistance of the Ten Rivers Diagram, it was okay.

If it was in the outside world, Ye Tian didn't know how many years it would take to refine the Will Pagoda again and again.

And Ye Tian has been in the Ten Rivers Diagram for so long, and the resource consumption is very serious.

The Void Tooth Holy Gate is a special time and space.

Feng Ming's original ancestor and the Void Tooth Holy Gate were communicating.

"Sect Master, the Endless Origin Ancestor is still in the Ten Rivers Diagram, and it consumes a lot of resources!" Feng Ming Origin Ancestor reported.

"I know, but these resources are worth expending, continue to urge the Ten Rivers Diagram until he has refined the Will Pagoda to the limit!" commanded the Void Fang Holy Ancestor.

Immediately, he asked casually: "How many times has the Endless Origin Ancestor refined the Will Pagoda?"

"Fifty-three times!"

Feng Ming Yuan Ancestor said.

"Fifty-three times, the record of the Upper Spirit Origin Domain has been broken, I'm curious how many times he can finally refine it!" muttered the Void Fang Saint Ancestor.

Hundreds of thousands of Primordial Epochs have passed.

Finally, on this day, Ye Tian tempered to the seventy-second time.

At this time, he had a feeling in his dark that his Will Pagoda could not continue to be refined, and seventy-two times was the real limit.

Thereupon.

Ye Tian came out of the Ten Rivers Diagram, and the Fivefold Origin Ancestors of the Void Tooth Holy Gate breathed a sigh of relief.

During this period of time, the resources consumed to urge the Ten Rivers Diagram were enough to make many of the Five Origin Ancestors bankrupt!

It is also the Void Tooth Holy Gate that has been inherited for countless years that it can withstand this kind of consumption, otherwise it really can't withstand it!

The Pagoda of Will has been tempered seventy-two times, reaching the limit of quenching, and the next step is to quench the body of the primordial Zhou Tian.

At this time, Ye Tian found that his refining speed was incomparably fast.

After all, he first tempered the Pagoda of Will, how terrifying the will of the Extreme Dao was, and then combined with the five Supreme Natal Primordial Control Techniques and the three hundred and sixty-five Extreme Extreme Dao to refine the Primordial Zhou Tian's body, the effect was naturally extremely fast.

It didn't take long for Ye Tian to successfully refine the original Zhou Tian's body completely.

Then the second, third, fourth......

With a large number of resources and treasures, Ye Tian's refining speed is very fast.

In just fifty thousand Primordial Realm Eras, he relied on himself to successfully refine the Primordial Zhou Tian's body seventy-two times!

At this point, Ye Tian found that he could no longer refine the body of the original Zhou Tian, he had already refined to the limit.

"The Will Pagoda has been tempered to the limit, and the Primordial Zhou Tian's body has also been tempered to the limit, I only need to prepare a Primordial Tribulation Qi, plus some Primordial Gold Beads, I can become a Five-Fold Primordial Ancestor 100%!"

Ye Tian muttered.

The speed of his breakthrough this time was too fast, I am afraid that it surpassed the imagination of the other fivefold holy gates, and it is estimated that the fivefold ancestors of the fivefold holy gates would not have imagined that he would be able to impact the fivefold origin ancestor realm in such a short time!

this day.

Ye Tian began to attack the realm of the Fivefold Origin Ancestor in the Extreme Mountain under the protection of the Fivefold Ancestor of the Void Tooth Holy Gate.

......

"Endless Primordial Ancestor, this is a primordial calamity!"

Feng Ming's original ancestor handed over a wisp of gray aura to Ye Tian.

Under the influence of this wisp of primordial calamity, the surrounding time and space seemed to be completely suppressed, and even the energy of the primordial black sea was suppressed.

It seems to be only a wisp of primordial calamity, but it seems to be the root of everything.

Moreover, it is too heavy.

If it was an ordinary fivefold primordial ancestor, if the primordial body had not been tempered to a certain extent, the physical body would be directly crushed by it!

Ye Tian took this wisp of primordial tribulation qi, and then began to absorb the retreat impact of the fivefold primordial ancestor.

Rumble!!!

The primordial calamity qi was absorbed and refined by Ye Tian and merged into the body of the primordial Zhou Tian.

At this time, the shackles in the darkness were clearly visible, and the road ahead was revealed.

Then, Ye Tian took out the primordial gold beads, and swallowed them in one bite, which struck the shackles.

It didn't take long.

Click!

The shackles in the dark were broken by Ye Tian, and the realm broke through.

Ye Tian directly stepped from the half-step Fivefold Origin Ancestor to the real Fivefold Origin Ancestor realm.

Whether it is the will of the Extreme Dao, or the body of the primordial Zhou Tian, the power of the original ancestor has ushered in a huge qualitative change.

Bang!!!!

Countless amounts of primordial energy poured into Ye Tian's body, helping him complete his body transformation.

Many rare resources were also taken out by Ye Tian to accelerate this transformation.

......

After a long time, Ye Tian's cultivation was completely stabilized in the realm of the Fifth Origin Ancestor.

And this news can't be hidden, the other five-fold ancestors of the Void Tooth Holy Gate must know about it, and those half-step five-fold ancestors will also know about it, and in this way, it is impossible to completely conceal the news.

So, not long after, the other Fivefold Holy Gates also knew that Ye Tian had stepped into the Fivefold Origin Ancestor realm.

Nine Lights Holy Gate.

"What, the Endless Origin Ancestor broke through to become a Five-Fold Primordial Ancestor, he was still a Fourfold Peak Ancestor before, how could he ???? so quickly"

The original ancestor of Dawn was stunned.

He knew very well that Ye Tian's demon could not only refine the Will Pagoda nine times, but definitely temper it to the top of the Thirty-six Will Pagoda, and this would take a lot of time!

As a result, Ye Tian broke through, and the speed was so fast that he couldn't believe it.

"It seems that the Void Fang Holy Gate has allowed the Endless Ancestor to quickly condense the Will Pagoda to the limit at all costs!"

Dawn Saint Ancestor guessed.

Now, Ye Tian has broken through to the realm of the Fifth Ancestral Ancestor, and no one knows how powerful his strength is.

However, the average Fivefold Peak Ancestor was definitely not his opponent.

"The strength of the Endless Ancestor may surpass me!"

Dawn Holy Ancestor smiled bitterly.

He was originally going to kill Ye Tian, but he didn't expect that after such a short period of time, he would not be able to deal with Ye Tian.

"No, I'm about to become a half-step six-fold ancestor!"

The Dawn Ancestor said secretly.

But even if he really broke through, would he dare to make a move?

He doesn't know!

......

The news has been leaked, and Ye Tian did not hide it, announcing that he had become a fivefold ancestor.

Suddenly, the other holy sons who were in the same era as Ye Tian were dumbfounded.

Especially the Ice Feather Holy Son, who was once defeated by Ye Tian, had the deepest emotion in his heart.

"I didn't expect that before I had cultivated to the peak of the Fourfold Primordial Ancestor, the Endless Primordial Ancestor would break through and become the Pentfold Primordial Ancestor. I don't know if I have any hope of becoming a Fivefold Primordial Ancestor, maybe after an endless long future, I will be lucky enough to become a Pentfold Ancestor, and the Endless Primordial Ancestor is already in the realm above the Sixfold Primordial Ancestor!"
